description: Firefox extensions parser reads extensions.json and emits BrowserEvent per add-on
steps: Read file as serde_json::Value, iterate addons array
Each addon: id (string), defaultLocale.name (string), version (string), installDate (i64 ms since Unix epoch)
Description: '{name} v{version}'. Attrs: id, name, version
Test: write test JSON to NamedTempFile, parse, verify
Test: parse_empty_addons_array — empty addons yields empty vec
Test: parse_single_firefox_addon — attrs[name] and attrs[version] correct, ts_ns = installDate * 1_000_000
